entities.boy: a boy holding an unwrapped present
entities.wrapping: torn gift wrapping on the floor

scenes.title: The Birthday Aftermath
scenes.background_prompt: A living room after a birthday party with deflated balloons, empty plates on a table, torn wrapping paper on the floor, and a banner hanging lopsided. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A living room showing the aftermath of a birthday party. A boy of about eight in a striped polo shirt sits on the carpet, holding a brand new toy robot still in its packaging, smiling down at it with delight. Around him on the floor, torn gift wrapping paper in bright colors — green with gold stars, blue with silver stripes — lies scattered in crumpled heaps. Deflated balloons in red and yellow sag from their strings tied to chair backs. A table behind him has empty paper plates with cake crumbs, half-drunk cups of juice, and a mostly eaten chocolate cake with messy frosting. A 'HAPPY BIRTHDAY' banner hangs lopsided across the wall, one end having come untaped. The room is messy but the boy looks completely content.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy on the carpet, sitting and holding a new toy robot still in packaging, smiling. Scattered torn wrapping paper in bright colors around him on the floor.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom-left foreground, a deflated blue balloon rests on a patterned beige rug. To its right is a large, messy pile of torn wrapping in shades of blue, yellow, and green, tangled with yellow ribbons. A young boy with short, wavy brown hair sits cross-legged on the rug in the center-left of the scene. He wears a mustard-yellow knit sweater over a blue collared shirt, brown trousers, and brown shoes. He is smiling and looking at a rectangular cardboard box he holds, which contains a green toy robot with red, blue, and yellow details. To the boy's right, a deflated green balloon lies on the rug, followed by a piece of crumpled red wrapping and another deflated green balloon in the bottom-right corner. Behind the boy, a rectangular wooden table with a lower shelf sits on the rug. On the table are three white plates, one of which has crumbs on it, along with two tan cups—one standing and one lying on its side—and a single blue cup. In the midground on the far left, an open arched doorway shows dense green foliage outside. On the cream-colored wall behind the boy, a string of colorful triangular bunting in red, yellow, blue, and green is attached with tape. To the right of the bunting, a large, dark-framed window reveals a bright outdoor landscape with several rounded green trees under a light blue sky dotted with white, fluffy clouds. The overall lighting is bright and even, indicating a clear day.
